titleStmt.title: SII 38.106: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 106. (A.R. No. 106 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravarttin Rājarājadēva III Year 13, Kaṟkaṭaka 9 Wednesday, Magha 2 = 5th July 1228 A.D.

summary.p: This records a gift of 90 ewes, a ram and two lampstands donated by Sambhuvarāyaṉ Aḻagiyaśīyaṉ, son of Sambhuvarāyan Pallavāṇḍāṉ to burn a perpetual lamp to the god at Tirivoṟṟiyūr in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The shepherds of Tribhuvanasundara-perunteru, Vīrabhadrakōṉ Ponnan, Āṟaman, son of Saḍaiyakkōn and Vīman, son of Pallakkōn undertook the responsibility of supplying 90 nāḷi of oil per annum to burn the perpetual lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravatti śrīrājarāja tevaṟ
ku yāṇṭu patinmuṉṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇ
ṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭai
yanāyaṉāyanāṟkuc campuvarāyan pallavāṇṭār makan
campuvarāyan Aḻakiyaciyan Innāyanāṟku vaitta tirunu
ntā viḷakku Onṟukku viṭṭa cemmali yāṭu toṇṇū
ṟum kiṭāy Onṟum Iraṇṭu nilaik kuttu viḷakku Onṟu
m Ivvāṇṭai kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu Onpatān tiyatiyāna
putan kiḻamaiyumakamum tutiyaiyum peṟṟa vanṟu
vaittatu Ivvāṭukaḷ kaikkoṇṭār tiripuvanacuntara
pperunterumanṟāṭikaḷil virapattirakkon ponnanu
m caṭaiyakkon makan Āṟamanum pallakkon makan
vimanum cāvāmuvāp perāṭāka kaikkoṇṭu Āṇṭu On
ṟukkut toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻi ney cantirātittavaraiyaḷa
kka kaṭavom panmāheśvararakṣai . svastiśrī
Digital edition of SII 38.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
